ground_truth.title: Cyber Risk Quantification for Financial Institutions Using Bayesian Networks
ground_truth.abstract: We develop a Bayesian network model for quantifying operational cyber risk in banking, calibrated on FDIC loss data and publicly disclosed breach events, and estimate cyber VaR for stress testing.
